helbackup.add_instance_prompt: Add a HELBACKUP instance via the Instances page to monitor backups.

empty.title: No Backup Sources
empty.subtitle: Add backup sources to monitor their status

guide.intro: Best practices and recommendations for a robust backup strategy.

types.ca_backup_desc: Reads the CA Backup plugin log from Unraid
types.duplicati_desc: Connects to the Duplicati web UI
types.vm_desc: Checks backup files in a local path

guide_content.intro: Best practices and recommendations for a robust backup strategy.
guide_content.rule_321_intro: The 3-2-1 rule is the industry standard:
guide_content.rule_321_offsite: 1 backup at an offsite location (e.g. cloud or offsite)
guide_content.ca_backup_intro: The CA Backup plugin backs up your Unraid configuration:
guide_content.ca_backup_2: Set up a cron job for nightly backups
guide_content.ca_backup_3: Write backups to a share on a different physical disk
guide_content.ca_backup_4: Recommendation: daily at 3:00 AM, 7 days retention
guide_content.docker_intro: Container configurations are easy to back up:
guide_content.docker_1: Use the "Docker Export" button here to export all container configs as JSON
guide_content.docker_3: For databases: use database-specific backup methods (pg_dump, mysqldump)
guide_content.docker_4: Tools like Duplicati or Kopia can incrementally back up Appdata directories
guide_content.kopia_intro: Kopia is a modern, encrypted backup tool:
guide_content.kopia_1: On Unraid: install Kopia as a Docker container (Linuxserver.io image)
guide_content.kopia_2: Repository: local, NAS (SMB/NFS) or cloud (S3, Backblaze B2, Azure)
guide_content.kopia_4: Kopia encrypts everything locally before uploading
guide_content.vm_intro: Backing up virtual machines on Unraid:
guide_content.vm_1: Shut down the VM before backup (consistent state)
guide_content.vm_2: Back up /mnt/user/domains/ with the .img and .xml files
guide_content.vm_3: Use Unraid's built-in VM Manager snapshot function if available
guide_content.duplicati_intro: Duplicati is a user-friendly, encrypted backup tool with a web UI:
guide_content.duplicati_9: HELDASH: enter URL http://server-ip:8200 + API key
guide_content.duplicati_api_key_hint: Find API key: Duplicati → Settings → API key
guide_content.test_intro: A backup that has never been tested is not a backup:
guide_content.test_4: Make sure backups are complete and readable
guide_content.dr_intro: Step-by-step guide to rebuilding the entire system:
guide_content.dr_1_desc: usb.unraid.net → download USB Creator → create new USB
guide_content.dr_2_desc: Copy config/ folder from backup to new USB — network, shares, users restored
guide_content.dr_3_desc: RAID1 SSDs/NVMes detected automatically → assign pool + start
guide_content.dr_4_desc: docker run ... (from Docker Config Export) or set up manually
guide_content.dr_5_desc: HELDASH → Backup → Docker → import JSON → all containers recreated
guide_content.dr_6_desc: Install CA Backup plugin → start restore from backup target
guide_content.dr_8_desc: Copy XML + IMG files back to /etc/libvirt/
guide_content.dr_9_desc: Check all services → reconnect backup sources in HELDASH
